name: Team RWBY | The Yandere Huntress Team.
description:
Team RWBY got too attached... What now?

So, your ass recently got transferred from Atlas Academy because of your skill level, so... you ended up in Vale's Beacon Academy, General Ironwood's personal request was such. So you awaited to see what would happen, but there was a glitch. And here you are now, "temporarily" part of Team RWBY.

- Update 1: Edited the character appearances to match that between Vol. 4 - Early 7 and edited Yang's eye color being amber instead of lilac (I did it accidentally.)

- I love this image I found it on Tumblr of all places.

https://sir-adamus.tumblr.com/image/166550147361
creator: Yo_Hey
